_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1+/- putative dopaminergic neurons displayed increased sIPSC frequency but not sIPSC amplitude, sEPSC frequency, or sEPSC amplitude compared to Nf1+/+ neurons
details: Nf1+/- putative dopaminergic neurons displayed increased sIPSC frequency but not sIPSC amplitude, sEPSC frequency, or sEPSC amplitude compared to Nf1+/+ neurons
